plan: Fix the QuerySet.ordered property in django/db/models/query.py (~line 1218): it currently returns True whenever query.default_ordering and Meta.ordering are set, but since Django 3.1 the compiler omits Meta.ordering for GROUP BY (annotated/aggregated) queries. Add a check so default ordering only counts when the query has no group_by, e.g. `elif self.query.default_ordering and self.query.get_meta().ordering and not self.query.group_by: return True`. The compiler (sql/compiler.py) correctly drops the ordering and is just a consumer; the wrong answer is produced at the ordered property, so this is a single-file fix there.
